ref.title: Lucky (Origin Feat)
body: You have Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regained on a long rest.
Advantage: when you roll a d20 for a d20 Test (attack roll, ability check, or saving throw), you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage.
Disadvantage: when a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll.

grantsPool.label: Luck Points
grantsPool.reminder: Lucky: gain Advantage on a d20 Test, or impose Disadvantage on an attack against you.

ref.title: Alert (Origin Feat)
body: Initiative Proficiency: you add your Proficiency Bonus to Initiative.
Initiative Swap: right after rolling Initiative, you may trade your result with a willing ally's — push the right teammate to the top of the order, or drop your control before the enemy acts.

ref.title: Shadow Touched (Origin Feat)
body: Increase an ability of your choice by 1. You learn Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion or Necromancy spell, each castable once per long rest without a slot (or with slots).

ref.title: Resilient
body: Increase one ability by 1 and gain proficiency in saving throws using that ability.
